---
pagetitle: "RESEARCH_THEME_TITLE"
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

```{=html}


<div class="research-subpage">

<section class="research-subpage-intro">
  <div class="research-kicker">KEYWORD1 · KEYWORD2 · KEYWORD3</div>
  <h2 class="research-title">RESEARCH_THEME_TITLE</h2>
  <div class="research-lede">
    <h3><i>CENTRAL_QUESTION</i></h3>
  </div>
</section>


<section class="research-subpage-section">
  <h2 class="research-section-title">Overview</h2>
  <p>
    This research theme is ...
  </p>

/*
  <h2 class="research-section-title">Interactive demo</h2>
  <p>
    The interactive [NAME] demo is ...
  </p>
  <a class="demo-button" href="../interactive/lloyd/">Launch interactive demo →</a>
*/
</section>



<section class="research-band">
  <div class="research-subpage-section">
    <h2 class="research-section-title">Relevant publications</h2>
    <p class="research-muted">
      This list is intended for publications connected to ...
    </p>

    <div class="publication-list">
    
    /* ADD MORE <article class="publication-item"> */
    
      <article class="publication-item">
        <a class="publication-snapshot-link" href="REPLACE_WITH_DOI">
					<img class="publication-snapshot" src="../images/publications/IMAGE_FILE" alt="Snapshot image for ...">
				</a>
        <div class="publication-detail">
        	<a class="title-link" href="REPLACE_WITH_DOI">
          	<h3>PUBLICATION TITLE</h3>
          </a>
          <div class="publication-meta">
            <strong>Authors:</strong> <u>Sungyeon Hong</u><br>
            <strong>Year:</strong> 202X<br>
            <strong>Publisher:</strong> PUBLISHER_NAME
          </div>
          <p class="publication-description">
            DESCRIPTION
          </p>
          /* IF NEEDED
          <div class="publication-links">
            <a href="REPLACE_WITH_DOI">DOI link →</a>
          </div>
          */
        </div>
      </article>

      
    </div>
  </div>
</section>


</div>

```
